_comment: Manual gap-fill for roles Wikidata doesn't track promptly. Entries here win over Wikidata output on (role, country) conflict. Update when refresh_officials.py starts returning correct results for a role — then remove that role from here.

current._note: Wikidata returned vandalism ('Phil Baker', since 2018) as of 2026-06 refresh. Remove when Wikidata is corrected.
